entry.title: Mod Settings (RitsuLib)
entry.subtitle: Edit mod options exposed to players.
baselib.mirroredPage.title: Mod config
baselib.mirroredPage.description: This page mirrors BaseLib-generated mod configuration entries.
ritsulib.page.title: Settings
ritsulib.page.description: Framework settings and settings UI reference entries.
ritsulib.section.general.title: General
ritsulib.section.general.description: Persisted framework settings exposed to players.
ritsulib.debugCompatibility.label: Debug compatibility mode
ritsulib.debugCompatibility.description: Enable compatibility fallbacks for localization, unlock, and Ancient dialogue edge cases. Per-feature toggles default to on.
ritsulib.section.debugCompatShims.title: Compatibility fallbacks
ritsulib.section.debugCompatShims.descri: Shown only when debug compatibility mode is enabled. Each toggle controls one compatibility fallback.
ritsulib.debugCompatLocTable.label: LocTable missing keys
ritsulib.debugCompatLocTable.description: Resolve missing keys to placeholder LocString values and log one [Localization][DebugCompat] warning per key.
ritsulib.debugCompatUnlockEpoch.label: Invalid unlock epochs
ritsulib.debugCompatUnlockEpoch.descript: Skip invalid epoch grants on RitsuLib-registered unlock paths and log one [Unlocks][DebugCompat] warning per stable key.
ritsulib.debugCompatAncientArchitect.des: Inject empty Lines entries for ModContentRegistry ancients when vanilla provides no dialogue.
ritsulib.section.reference.title: Reference
ritsulib.section.reference.description: Reference controls available in the settings UI.
ritsulib.reference.intro: Open the control preview page to inspect available controls and layout behavior.
ritsulib.reference.gallery.label: Control preview
ritsulib.reference.gallery.description: Reference page only. Values on this page are not saved.
ritsulib.showcase.title: Control Preview
ritsulib.showcase.description: Demonstrates supported controls and dynamic descriptions without persisting values.
ritsulib.showcase.overview.title: Overview
ritsulib.showcase.header.description: Reference controls backed by preview-only bindings.
ritsulib.showcase.summary: Toggle: {0} | Double: {1:0.##} | Int: {2} | Choice: {3} | Dropdown: {4} | Mode: {5} | Action Count: {6}
ritsulib.showcase.image.label: Reference image
ritsulib.showcase.image.description: Image previews can participate in dynamic descriptions. Current mode: {0}
ritsulib.showcase.inputs.title: Inputs
ritsulib.showcase.inputs.description: Editing these controls updates the preview state only.
ritsulib.showcase.toggle.label: Preview toggle
ritsulib.showcase.slider.label: Preview slider
ritsulib.showcase.intSlider.label: Preview integer slider
ritsulib.showcase.choice.label: Preview choice
ritsulib.showcase.choiceDropdown.label: Preview choice (dropdown)
ritsulib.showcase.choiceDropdown.descrip: Same options as the stepper control, rendered as a dropdown. Current: {0}
ritsulib.showcase.mode.label: Preview enum choice
ritsulib.showcase.string.label: Preview string field
ritsulib.showcase.stringMulti.label: Preview multiline field
ritsulib.showcase.stringMulti.placeholde: Multiple lines — Enter inserts a new line.
ritsulib.showcase.actions.title: Commands
ritsulib.showcase.actions.description: Buttons can mutate preview state and refresh adjacent descriptions.
ritsulib.showcase.action.label: Preview command
ritsulib.showcase.reset.label: Reset preview bindings
ritsulib.showcase.reset.description: Restore all preview bindings to default values without persisting data.
ritsulib.showcase.list.title: Structured List
ritsulib.showcase.list.description: Structured collections can be edited, reordered, added, and removed inside the settings UI.
ritsulib.showcase.list.label: Preview structured collection
ritsulib.showcase.footer: Use this page as a reference when implementing settings pages.
sidebar.title: Mods
sidebar.subtitle: Browse registered mods, pages, and sections.
choice.dropdown.tooltip: Opens a list to choose a value. Current: {0}
choice.dropdown.currentRow: Active option shown by the collapsed control.
empty.none: No mod settings pages are currently registered.
empty.mod: This mod has no registered settings page.
color.title: Color Editor
keybinding.hint.combo: Click to record. Supports key combinations.
keybinding.hint.comboNonModifier: Click to record. Supports key combinations and requires a non-modifier key.
keybinding.hint.single: Click to record a single key.
keybinding.hint.capturing: Press a key combination. Esc cancels, Backspace/Delete clears.
ritsulib.showcase.list.field.name: Name
ritsulib.showcase.details.title: Detail Notes
ritsulib.showcase.details.description: Nested structured list editor for each item.
ritsulib.showcase.details.field.label: Label
clipboard.pasteFailedBlocked: Paste was blocked by a custom rule.
clipboard.pasteFailedIncompatible: Clipboard contents are not compatible with this setting.
